summary: Iteration 29 · Voice Lab external-URL fetcher + one-click 'Associa direttamente a fonema' panel — BOTH backend and frontend PASS. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases green in /app/backend/tests/test_iter29_fetch_external.py covering auth guard (401/403 without JWT), input validation (400 on empty/whitespace URL with 'URL vuoto' detail, 400 on ftp:// and file:// schemes with 'http/https only' detail), non-audio rejection (415 on https://example.com/ with detail mentioning content-type/html/audio), happy-path fetch of raw.githubusercontent.com/anars/blank-audio/1-second-of-silence.mp3 returning {url, relative_url starting with '/api/uploads/manual/', filename starting with 'manual/', content_type='audio/mpeg', size_bytes>100, source_url echoed, filename_hint honoured}, reachability of the stored file (GET /api/uploads/manual/…mp3 → 200 audio), and full E2E fetch → PATCH u-foot/audio-url key='isolated-AmE' → GET u-foot verifies audio.AmE.isolated equals the just-fetched relative_url. Frontend (Playwright via preview URL): on /admin → tab-audio-studio → all 7 required testids present (elevenlabs-studio, el-upload-dropzone, el-upload-file, el-external-url, el-external-fetch-btn, el-ipa-input, el-generate-btn). Full external-fetch + associate flow verified: pasted the blank-audio MP3 URL into el-external-url → clicked el-external-fetch-btn → after ~2s el-result panel appeared with el-url containing 'https://vocalfitness.org/api/uploads/manual/1-second-of-silence_<ts>.mp3'; new cyan-bordered el-associate-panel visible with el-assoc-card dropdown populated with 45 options (44 phoneme cards + placeholder '— seleziona —'), el-assoc-slot with 4 optgroups (Isolato, Mnemonica, Esempi, Parole comuni), el-assoc-index correctly HIDDEN on default isolated-AmE and APPEARS on slot='word-AmE' with live key preview 'word-0-AmE'. Selecting card='u-foot' + slot='isolated-AmE' → click el-assoc-btn → text flipped from 'Associa e salva' to 'Associata ✓', confirmation line shows '✓ URL salvato in /ʊ/ · isolated-AmE'. Network trace confirms exactly two backend calls: POST /api/admin/elevenlabs/fetch-external-audio {url:'…blank-audio…mp3'} → 200, and PATCH /api/admin/phonemes/u-foot/audio-url {key:'isolated-AmE', url:'/api/uploads/manual/1-second-of-silence_1783529832.mp3'} → 200. Regression testids el-upload-dropzone, el-upload-file, el-ipa-input, el-generate-btn still present and visually intact (see screenshot).
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routers/elevenlabs.py:449 — url_ext extraction uses rsplit('.',1) but does not strip query strings (e.g. '?raw=true'). For URLs like 'https://…/file.mp3?raw=true' path.rsplit('.',1)[-1] returns 'mp3?raw=true' which fails the set lookup on line 488. Not blocking (real audio URLs typically don't carry query params on the path), but a urlparse(path).path.split('?')[0] cleanup would harden it. All 9 pytest cases pass with the current URL set.

backend/routers/elevenlabs.py:453 — httpx.AsyncClient is created and destroyed on every call. For low-traffic admin endpoint this is fine, but a module-level client with connection pooling would cut ~30ms per fetch. Optional micro-optimisation.

backend/routers/elevenlabs.py:460 — remote HTTP status ≥400 is bubbled up as 502 with 'Remote returned HTTP {status}'. Good design (server-side proxy shouldn't leak client-error semantics of 3rd-party CDN). No change required.

ElevenLabsStudio.jsx now 692 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline. The Associate panel (~lines 588-673) and the Repository IPA <details> block (~lines 457-469) are natural extraction candidates into <AssociatePanel /> and <IpaRepoLinks /> sub-components. Not blocking but flagged for future refactor.

ElevenLabsStudio.jsx:212 — handleAssociate() catches errors into setError() but does NOT reset associated=false if a subsequent attempt fails after a success. Minor UX quirk: after a 4-second timeout on the success flash, the next failed attempt would show a stale associated=true briefly. In practice associating→true also runs before the request so it flashes correctly. Not a bug.

ElevenLabsStudio.jsx:36-37 — assocWordIndex/assocExampleIndex default to 0 but max=29 is hardcoded on line 643. For phonemes with fewer than 30 examples/words the frontend allows selecting out-of-range indices; the backend PATCH endpoint should (and does per iter-26 tests) return 400 in that case, so failure mode is graceful. No frontend guard needed but flagged.
Iteration 28 static observations still stand: phoneme_cards.py backend ~2951 lines and PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx frontend ~2541 lines both exceed 700-line guideline. Not iter-29 scope.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (7/7 acceptance criteria: testids present, external URL fetch works end-to-end via preview URL, associate panel renders with 44 cards + 4 optgroups, index input toggles correctly on word-*/example-* slots with live key preview, full fetch→associate→persist chain confirms POST/PATCH network calls with exact expected payloads and 200 responses, u-foot isolated-AmE persistence verified in backend GET)

test_credentials: admin / VocalFitness2026! (login via placeholder-based inputs; Enter on password submits; JWT stored in localStorage as access_token). Legacy popup modal on /area-clienti and /admin dismissed via 'OK' button.
seed_data_creation: One MP3 fetched from raw.githubusercontent.com/anars/blank-audio/master/1-second-of-silence.mp3 (~37KB) persisted twice via backend tests to /api/uploads/manual/TEST_iter29_blank_<ts>.mp3 and /api/uploads/manual/TEST_iter29_assoc_<ts>.mp3. One additional fetch via frontend test persisted to /api/uploads/manual/1-second-of-silence_<ts>.mp3. On phoneme card u-foot, audio.AmE.isolated was overwritten with two of these URLs during E2E persistence checks. Card has hotspots_locked=true but audio slots are NOT locked (as noted in the review brief), PATCH succeeded. Not destructive — the URLs point to valid MP3 payloads and can be replayed or overwritten again.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-29 fully verified. New endpoint POST /api/admin/elevenlabs/fetch-external-audio and new UI testids (el-external-url, el-external-fetch-btn, el-associate-panel, el-assoc-card, el-assoc-slot, el-assoc-index, el-assoc-btn) are stable. To regen the pytest suite: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter29_fetch_external.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/iter29_results.xml` (2.9s, no ElevenLabs credits burned since fetch is a pure HTTP proxy). For Playwright: navigate to /login → fill admin/VocalFitness2026! → dismiss popup 'OK' → goto /admin → dismiss popup 'OK' → click [data-testid=tab-audio-studio] → then paste URL and click Scarica. The backend returns absolute URL prefixed with FRONTEND_URL (https://vocalfitness.org/...) while the relative_url used for PATCH is /api/uploads/manual/... — the frontend uses result.relative_url in handleAssociate() so the stored value on the card is the relative path (correct for cross-env compat).
